case_title: ROBERT BARTOLOZZI et al VS. ZHOU PENG et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED AUG-11-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PENG, ZHOU DBA ERADIANCE JEWELRY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT DEFENDANT TANG BAOLAI ETC. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ZHOU PENG ETC.--OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PENG, ZHOU DBA ERADIANCE JEWELRY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARTOLOZZI, ROBERT WALKER, DIANE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PENG, ZHOU DBA ERADIANCE JEWELRY BAOLAI, TANG DBA GRACE JEWELRY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,290.00 FILED BY BARTOLOZZI, ROBERT WALKER, DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT PENG, ZHOU DBA ERADIANCE JEWELRY BAOLAI, TANG DBA GRACE JEWELRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED AUG-11-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BAOLAI, TANG DBA GRACE JEWELRY
